releaseNotes: Kokoro narration now splits text safely below the 510-token model limit, prebuffers upcoming chunks, and streams generated PCM audio through Android AudioTrack without temp files.
Kokoro ONNX failures now surface real diagnostics instead of silently dropping back to Android TTS.
Added account billing plan choices for Premium 3 devices and Premium Unlimited, with active-session device limits enforced on login.
Movie, cartoon, and K-drama free accounts keep the 20-minute movie preview and 20% episode preview before subscription.
Offline downloads now save real local anime video/HLS files, manga page files, and novel text into app-private device storage, and the Downloads library hides stale remote-only entries.
Anime adds Consumet-backed server choices alongside Anineko and AnimePahe, plus season selection for multi-season titles.
Video players now recognize suffixless playlist/manifest stream URLs as direct media so they do not open as blank web pages.
New Android installs keep session data out of device restore so Mike’s premium account cannot auto-appear on another phone.
